## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, updates, and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [162 articles published; slight dip in weekly clicks (50 fewer) but not concerning](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [15 new articles generated, to be published soon](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [New content format focusing on website design examples to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Webstacks' new website launch in 4-6 weeks, featuring improved blog template and conversion options](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [162 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Performance reports now available in Notion, categorized by week](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Slight dip in weekly clicks (about 50 fewer)](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [UX guide from early December saw 30 fewer clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Team to monitor performance for 2-3 weeks before deeper investigation](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Exploring integration with Looker Studio for real-time insights](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Challenges with Google Analytics reporting discussed](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Content Updates and New Assignments

  - [15 new articles generated, currently being staged in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### New Content Format: Website Design Examples

  - [Focus on successful pages (e.g., pricing, partners) across industries](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [AI to be used for generating content based on provided website examples](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Format to include company overview, design insights, and key takeaways](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Potential challenges with workflow adaptation to be addressed with Marcus and Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [10 assignments for this week to test and refine the new approach](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Webstacks Website Update

  - [QA started this morning](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Launch expected in 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Improved blog template and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [New conversion panel options (downloadable resources, capability links, case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [No content freeze planned during migration](https://fathom.video/share/Hbdezznyz1ZQUzyu5SCgBfmaD6xuQiZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
